title: Module System Studies
description: Five independent stills exploring alternate module treatments for cinematic hardware microsites, from comparison grids to accessory callouts and campaign cutdowns.
creative_direction: Each image is a self-contained hardware-web study rather than a direct continuation. The shared goal is to prove that cinematic hardware storytelling can survive across different website modules, mockup formats, and commercial crops without collapsing into generic ecommerce UI.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is an independent microsite module study.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Module System Studies
en.description: Five independent stills exploring alternate module treatments for cinematic hardware microsites, from comparison grids to accessory callouts and campaign cutdowns.

zh-CN.title: 模块系统研究
zh-CN.description: 五张独立静帧，研究硬件微站的不同模块处理方式，包括对比网格、配件说明与 campaign 裁切图。
